name: iivo-glass
description: IIVO Glass — transparent desktop AI overlay companion for IIVO.
author: Christopher Miles / IIVO

scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types --test src/test/config.test.ts src/test/glassLayoutManager.test.ts src/test/glassWindowLayout.test.ts src/test/glassOperations.test.ts src/test/glassAskTypes.test.ts src/test/glassScreenContext.test.ts src/test/glassVisualIntent.test.ts src/test/glassScreenshotRetention.test.ts src/test/visualImageOptimizerConfig.test.ts src/test/visualAskQuality.test.ts src/test/visualImageCrop.test.ts src/test/visualAskPreflight.test.ts src/test/visualAskDiagnostics.test.ts src/test/cgWindowCoordinates.test.ts src/test/glassBrowserHandoff.test.ts src/test/glassCapabilities.test.ts src/test/captureSourceEnumeration.test.ts src/test/captureDiagnostics.test.ts src/test/glassPackagingVariant.test.ts src/test/screenCaptureProbe.test.ts src/test/systemAudioProbe.test.ts src/test/virtualAudioDevices.test.ts src/test/virtualAudioCapture.test.ts src/test/systemAudioUi.test.ts src/test/commandBarMic.test.ts src/test/glassAskClientPayload.test.ts src/test/glassLatestScreenshot.test.ts src/test/glassAskClient.test.ts src/test/glassAskTiming.test.ts src/test/glassSettings.test.ts src/test/glassHotkeySettings.test.ts src/test/followMouseDisplay.test.ts src/test/multiDisplay.test.ts src/test/panelStatusGrid.test.ts src/test/glassE2eSmoke.test.ts src/test/commandFeed.test.ts src/test/contextPayload.test.ts src/test/noteExtraction.test.ts src/test/savedMoments.test.ts src/test/privacyState.test.ts src/test/sessionStore.test.ts src/test/sessionIntelligence.test.ts src/test/sessionSummary.test.ts src/test/sessionPayload.test.ts src/test/sessionScreenshotPaths.test.ts src/test/transcriptionTypes.test.ts src/test/windowContext.test.ts src/test/iivoAnalysisClient.test.ts src/test/systemAudioCapture.test.ts src/test/sttTypes.test.ts src/test/sttOpenAI.test.ts src/test/sttServer.test.ts src/test/systemAudioFixHints.test.ts src/test/audioPersistence.test.ts src/test/audioChunks.test.ts src/test/overlayCards.test.ts src/test/sessionCopilot.test.ts src/test/listeningLimit.test.ts src/test/glassBranchHygiene.test.ts src/test/copilotSessionSemantic.test.ts src/test/copilotDiagnosticAnalysis.test.ts src/test/glassGitGuard.test.ts src/test/bootSplash.test.ts
scripts.e2e: npm run build && playwright test -c playwright.electron.config.ts
scripts.e2e:display: npm run build && playwright test tests/e2e/glass-multidisplay.spec.ts -c playwright.electron.config.ts --headed
scripts.e2e:headed: npm run build && playwright test -c playwright.electron.config.ts --headed
scripts.e2e:debug: npm run build && playwright test -c playwright.electron.config.ts --debug
scripts.qa:manual: echo 'Manual QA checklist: desktop-glass/GLASS_QA.md — run: npm run dev && npm run glass:dev'
scripts.dist: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip
